div.style: color: rgb(31, 60, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A payer is who gets charged.
A beneficiary is who receives the hosted service.
They can be the same record or different records.

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Person
An individual community member or sponsor

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Community
A group that may receive hosted service

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Billing Plan
Defines price, interval, and plain-language benefits

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Billing Subscription
Local record linking a plan, payer, and beneficiary

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Merchant Account
Optional payout onboarding for future commerce

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Billing Event
Recorded Stripe webhook activity and replay state

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Subscription Summary Report
Point-in-time CSV export of subscription/MRR/event health

div.style: color: rgb(31, 60, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hosted Entitlement
Calculated answer: is hosted access active?

div.style: color: rgb(18, 48, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stripe
External billing and payout provider
